rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KATHRYN ANN VENNERI
rulings.Rulings: DeSales Catholic High School's and St. Francis Catholic Church's Motion to Disqualify Counsel Amy Shelf is denied. It is procedurally deficient in form and content, and substantively lacks merit: 1.No separate memorandum of points and authorities was submitted, and in addition a mere reference to "court files and records" with no request for judicial notice is insufficient; 2. Rules of Professional Conduct 5-210 is inapplicable on its face as (a) it does not apply to court trials which this Probate Proceeding will be ( Probate Code Sections 825 and 8252(b) and (b) Attorney Shelf would not be the witness in any event since she did not draft the will. As such, the Court finds the motion to be frivolous and will award fees and costs upon proper p[roof CCP 128.5(b)(1) and (2).
